summary: Video chat/streaming app with pinned video functionality and GIF picker. UI improvements ongoing.

existing_features.title: In the PinnedVideo component, overlay the unpin (X) button absolutely at the top-right corner of the video container (top-2 right-2), styled as a small circular button (bg-black/50 text-white rounded-full w-6 h-6) with a hover effect (hover:bg-black/70). Remove any separate header row or dedicated section that previously housed the unpin button.

In the PinnedVideo component, add a non-clickable pin icon (Lucide Pin icon) absolutely overlaid at the top-left corner of the video container (top-2 left-2), styled identically to the X button (bg-black/50 text-white rounded-full w-6 h-6) as a visual indicator that the video is pinned.

new_feature_requests.summary: Overlay X (remove pin) button on top-right of pinned video, and pin icon on top-left, to save space
